About Double Majer / Minor

Istanbul Galata University offers a variety of options for associate and undergraduate students in accordance with their interests and career goals. With the double major program, Istanbul Galata University allows students who show outstanding success to receive an associate's / bachelor's degree in addition to the main programs of a second program with a content close to their main programs. With the minor program, students are given the opportunity to study in a specific field in which they want to gain knowledge.

The double major program provides students with the opportunity to study in two different major programs at the same time. Students have the chance to add a new dimension to their careers by gaining more knowledge and experience in another field of interest. In this way, they gain knowledge and skills in both fields.

A minor program offers students the opportunity to choose a minor program in addition to their major program. The minor program allows students to specialize in a subject related to their major field but more specific. Double major and minor programs provide students with an interdisciplinary perspective and enable them to graduate with a broad knowledge base. It also provides the advantage of having different skills and specializations to be competitive in the business world.

Scholarships

If the students who prefer our university are entitled to double major or minor education by achieving academic success in their major program, no tuition fee is charged for the second major and minor education.

Click here for scholarship details. https://galataedu-my.sharepoint.com/personal/kurumsal_galata_edu_tr/_layouts/15/onedrive.aspx?id=%2Fpersonal%2Fkurumsal%5Fgalata%5Fedu%5Ftr%2FDocuments%2FKurumsal%20Ortak%2FGalata%20Web%20%C3%87al%C4%B1%C5%9Fmalar%C4%B1%2Fana%20sayfa%20%C3%B6%C4%9Frenci%2F9%2D%20Burslar%20ve%20%C4%B0ndirimler

Scholarships

Students who choose our university and achieve academic success in their major program, qualifying for a double major (ÇAP) or a minor program, are exempt from tuition fees for their second major and minor program education.
